settings.question: How long does delivery take?
settings.answer: We deliver pan-India within 3-5 business days. For remote areas, delivery may take 7-10 business days. You'll receive a tracking link via SMS and email once your order is dispatched.

settings.question: Do you offer custom sizing?
settings.answer: Yes! We offer custom sizing at no extra charge. Simply share your measurements in the order notes at checkout and our tailors will craft your blouse to your exact fit.

settings.question: What is your return policy?
settings.answer: We offer 7-day hassle-free returns on all unworn items in original condition with tags intact. Simply initiate a return from your order page or contact our support team and we'll arrange a free pickup.

settings.question: How can I track my order?
settings.answer: Once your order is dispatched, a tracking link will be sent to your registered mobile number via SMS and to your email address. You can also track your order from the "My Orders" section on our website.

settings.question: Do you offer wholesale?
settings.answer: Yes, we offer wholesale pricing for orders above 50 pieces. Please write to us at wholesale@vamas.in with your requirements and we'll get back to you with our bulk pricing catalog.

settings.hero_sub: We'd love to hear from you
settings.form_sub: Fill in the form and we'll get back to you shortly.
settings.placeholder_message: Tell us how we can help you...
settings.success_message: Thank you! We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
settings.faq_subtext: Quick answers to what our customers ask most
